'''Akkar Plint''' was a gangster who lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was member of the [[Swang's Swoopers]] gang.

==Biography==
At some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], he was working for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] official [[Gohn Bimmin]] on Tatooine. [[Eugene Talmont]] soon discovered this and sent an Imperial spacer to eliminate him.<ref name="AED" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TempSwooper.jpg|250px|thumb|Randomly generated depictions of Akkar Plint, including two female depictions deemed non-canon in ''Legends'']]
Akkar Plint was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="AED" />
